criteria: record nested repos and duplicate remotes
record dirty, upstream, test, deploy, doc, SEO, and visibility surfaces
emit public-safe summary and private structured index
cluster repos, worktrees, prompts, product surfaces, duplicate apps, stale forks, and cache-only roots
assign one canonical owner record per cluster
verification: fixture duplicate repos collapse to one canonical owner
tracked outputs contain no raw prompt text

criteria: feed repo/product candidates into the global product ledger
mark blocked local work at item scope
continue selecting the next highest-value unblocked product
verification: blocked product fixture keeps global status active

criteria: parse plan-bearing user and assistant messages from the full source session
attach all unique source_plan_hashes to every planner and executor packet
verification: synthetic session test asserts event count, unique count, duplicate count, ordering, and packet source_plan_hashes

criteria: record name-collision, transfer, App-token, and owner-rewrite gates
avoid irreversible GitHub/org/App/credential mutation without human gate
stage public-safe proof mirrors or explicit not_applicable
verification: receipt proves no outbound write command ran

blocked_local_work.blocker: newer fanout and ledger implementation is absent from this planner branch
logs/organ-health.json and logs/usage.json are absent in this worktree snapshot
GitHub consolidation mutations require human gate
Cloudflare and credential gates remain human actions
Codex reset, credit, top-up, or paid overage is owner-controlled

executor_stop_conditions: raw prompt or plan body publication
